settings.heading: The Power of Human  Microbiome In Health & Longevity
The Power of Human  Microbiome In Health & Longevity
Human Commensal Microbiota
settings.text: Refers to the microbial flora naturally living in human body. The total collection of all of their genes is called Human Microbiome
settings.tip_text: Human Microbiome is now considered as a highly adaptable “human organ” with multitude of metabolic functions in human body.

settings.heading_text: Human Microbiome plays a critical role in maintaining our Health & Longevity
settings.tip_1_text: Gut microbiomes are in constant communication with our body's cells; to the point that our intestinal flora is said to be our second brain.
settings.tip_2_text: Microbiome and Immune System's cross-talk during early life stages can shape the proper development of immune system. And impairment to this process can lead to several immune disorders later in life. Among the human microbes, gut microbiome is the major one, which has far-reaching impact on human health.

settings.items:
• Gut Microbiome comprises of 100 trillion microbes and contains over 3 million microbial genes modulating human genome.
  • Over 1,000 species of bacteria have been cataloged from gut flora and can weigh up to 2 kg!

settings.heading: Human Microbiome Functions
settings.category_1_items:
• Proper maturation and maintenance of immune tissues
  • Control and maintain immune homeostasis
  • Produces immune-molecules such as butyric acid, antimicrobial peptides, key signaling molecules, natural antibiotics
  • Prevents the growth of disease-causing pathogenic bacteria
settings.category_2_items:
• Enhance the gut barrier function to reduce “leaky gut-mediated inflammation”
  • Produces anti-inflammatory molecules
  • Reduces endotoxin mediated chronic inflammation
  • Enhances skin barrier function to reduce dermatological allergic diseases
settings.category_3_items:
• Regulates energy balance by harvest & expenditure from diet
  • Controls appetite & satiety
  • Increases insulin sensitivity, controls adiposity & optimum maintenance of body weight
  • Proper cholesterol metabolism for cardiovascular health
  • Helps liver to metabolize & detoxify drugs (e.g. opioids, NSAIDs)
settings.category_4_items:
• Enhances digestion by producing enzymes, vitamins & growth factors
  • Produces gut hormones, & balances intestinal pH
  • Control the gut motility & proper colonic tone for bowel movement
settings.category_5_items:
• Produces longevity enhancing metabolites from diet such as Urolithins, Quercetins etc
  • Produces anti-cancer metabolites from natural compounds
  • Regulates & balances key endocrine hormones
settings.category_6_items:
• Gut-brain axis modulates behaviors – mood, emotion, stress response, appetite, addiction
  • Microbiome regulates tryptophan metabolism and the serotonergic system
  • Gut microbiota has important function in visceral sensitivity & perception
  • Produces neuroactive & cognitive enhancing metabolites
  • Regulates circadian rhythm & proper sleep pattern

settings.text_1: Our gut microbiome evolves from birth to a mature homeostatic core microbiome modulating several beneficial functions. Any disturbances is called dysbiosis which can alter the normal balance.
settings.text_2: Dysbiosis of the gut microbiome is caused by the imbalance between the commensal and pathogenic microbiomes.
settings.statement: Today, dysbiosis has been linked with several disease conditions such as autoimmune, digestive, metabolic and other chronic inflammatory diseases

settings.tip_text: Healthy and diverse diet can promote a diversified microbiome which in turn helps to protect our health.
settings.side_text: Is critical to achieve optimum health & longevity
settings.banner_heading: Biom Probiotics® Diversify Your Microbiome For Health, Well-being and Longevity

settings.heading: What Is Biom Probiotics®? Biom Probiotics® Different From Other Products?
settings.text:
Biom Probiotics® is a next-generation probiotic technology focused on microbiome diversity & balance

Biom Probiotics® is a microbiome science-driven product formulated by scientists and physicians founders. We have built-in several layers of efficacy to be an excellent gut microbiome health enhancer using microbiome science and formulation technology

Biom Probiotics® is Non-GMO, Gluten-free, Dairy-free, Soy-free, No Artificial dyes or preservatives, Vegetarian, Made-in-USA

settings.heading: Biom Probiotics®: R & D
settings.items:
• Biom Probiotics® is the result of innovative microbiome R & D developed by a team of scientists, physicians & clinical practitioners
  • We have developed Biomsify™ humanized probiotic production and delivery technology along with Microbiome Diversifying Complex. Biom Probiotics® is the result of 4 patent-pending technology

settings.heading: Biom Probiotics®: Production
settings.items: • While most of the probiotics in the market are made by private label companies, we produce Biom Probiotics in our own temperature-controlled cGMP facility with control over high-level potency and shelf life.

settings.heading: Biom Probiotics®: Form & Delivery
settings.items:
• Acid-resistant enteric-coating prevents die-offs of freeze-dried probiotics in stomach acid pH and ensures bacteria's viability until they reach intestine and colon
  • Biom Probiotic® capsules ensures the formulation are protected and delivered efficiently via microencapsulated sustained release technology
  • Prebiotic cellulosic capsule

settings.statement: Studies have shown that probiotics capsules without proper enteric coating and microencapsulation lose 60% or more viability before reaching target sites

settings.heading: Biom Probiotics®: Storage & Delivery
settings.items:
• Even though our probiotic formulation is stable at room temperature, we take extra caution to store and deliver in a colder temperature to enhance & assure maximum potency
  • We have special “Kangaroo” packaging for maintain cold temperature for 100% potency for online shipping deliveries

settings.text: Temperature abuse of probiotics during production, storage & delivery can significantly reduce the potency of probiotics. 70-80% of the current probiotics in the market do not have the labeled potency

settings.items:
• Taking probiotics is only one part of the microbiome health puzzle. At Biom, our expert scientists nutritionists and health practitioners provide free consultation on diet and dietary supplements optimized for your microbiome. As a separate service, we can track and catalogue your temporal microbiome changes and recommend diet & supplements plan
  • We provide 24/7 customer services for our valued customers

settings.heading: Who We Recommend To Take Biom Probiotics®? Microbiome Vulnerable Group
settings.subheading: Highly Recommended For Restoring Nourishing and Diversifying Dysbiotic Microbiome in the following groups
settings.list_1:
• People/patients taking antibiotics or antimicrobial therapy
  • People/patients taking opioids or other NSAIDs pain medications or opioid-addicted patients
  • People/patients having digestive dysfunctions (Crohn's disease, IBD, IBS, Celiac diseases)
  • People/patients using medical cannabis for medical or recreational use
  • Alzheimer's and Parkinson's patients
  • Autistic patients
  • People undergoing diet control or weight loss programs/regimes
  • Women with Menopause symptoms
  • Patients undergoing chemotherapy and other immunotherapies
settings.list_2:
• People who recently had diarrheal episodes due to medications, travel or food-borne infection
  • Patients taking Proton Pump Inhibitors (PPI)-based drugs (e.g. GORD and to prevent gastric and duodenal ulcers)
settings.card_1_text: For optimum energy metabolism and rebalancing gut microbiome
settings.card_2_text: For diversifying gut microbiome for enhanced brain functions, disease resistance, and quality of life
settings.card_3_text: For diversifying gut microbiome for a healthy life along with longevity
